title: Cobblemon Pals
body:
The Palword experience with Cobblemon.

Cobblemon 1.7 is out now!

Invent machines using the Create mod

Explore dungeons and defeat bosses with L_Ender 's Cataclysm and more modded mobs

Gear up with guns and weapons with Vic's Point Blank mod and Simply Sword mod with Better Combat mod.

Build on the vast world with modded world generation.

GUNS, WEAPONS, BOSS, STRUCTURES, COBBLEMON WORKERS, & MORE

RECOMMENDED TO HAVE 6GB RAM
